## Testing

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] New code in `core/` has unit tests
- [ ] TypeScript strict mode — no `any`, no `@ts-ignore`
- [ ] No PHI in logs, comments, or test fixtures
- [ ] No new dependencies without updating `agentic.md`

## Security checklist (if touching crypto, mesh, or Stellar)

- [ ] No private keys logged or stored outside Android Keystore
- [ ] No PHI written on-chain
- [ ] All mesh payloads CBOR-encoded and NaCl-encrypted
- [ ] Trust chain verification not bypassed
